subject: Map of Phlan age
fact: The map of Phlan found in the rogue's lair is approximately a year or two old.
source_quote: approximately a year or two old

subject: Map of Phlan count
fact: One detailed map of the town of Phlan was found in the rogue's lair.
source_quote: A detailed map of the town of Phlan

subject: Maps of Mulmaster count
fact: Two maps of Mulmaster were found in the rogue's lair.

subject: travel to Rogue's Lair duration
fact: The journey to the rogue mind flayer's lair is estimated to take approximately ten days.
source_quote: estimated to take approximately ten days
